12210819: The sidebar consists of the **navigation bar** and the **table of contents** for the article structure. Let's go through them one by one.
dffc46ee: Whether it's a blog or a documentation site, we all need a page to display article content, and this page is the article page.
60c16e87: The article page template is a `.article.ts` file located in the `.kecare/` directory. The generator will call it when processing each article to generate the article detail page.
9f11a481: In summary, `.article.ts` only requires you to return an object containing `urlPath`, `fsPath`, and `template`. The generator can then correctly invoke the template for page generation. `urlPath` is the access path for the article, `fsPath` is the physical path where the file is generated, and `template` is the template string for the Vue component.
7d1e5d0d: We have invoked the `<ArticleTheme/>` component in the template, so next we should proceed to write the page component.
f9eb6cc2: In Vue, data is used in the form of text interpolation, such as `Article Title: {{ article.title }}`. `article.html` contains the HTML content converted from Markdown, rendered using the `v-html` directive. The specific styling is up to your imagination.
afe5f356: Since the article content is directly generated via `v-html`, if we want to control the generated content, we need to write a lot of CSS code. However, it's not a big problem. I can provide a template for most HTML tags here, which you can modify based on my version. You can then import it in the `<style scoped>` section of the article page.
ab6af9ef: We need to write the structure in the `.kecare/menus/` directory now.
c6d73376: You can view the [Menu System](https://kecare.kecream.cn/articles/zh-CN/4ee23999) here. After writing the corresponding structure, when running the generator, it will traverse the `*.menu.source.ts` files in the directory, modify the `link` within them to the correct article paths, and generate a `*.menu.generated.ts` file.
4fc97054: Let's create a Sidebar template for a navigation bar
120206b2: Next, you can add div elements for additional beautification~ Then call it in the article page.
eefc1f58: It's very simple, isn't it meow.
695ead1b: Kecare has already handled the structure of the table of contents for you when processing markdown articles.
4b17d9d6: Simply add class="kecare-sidebar" where you want the table of contents to appear.
98d64046: That's all set meow, but you'll need to add the CSS styles yourself meow. The directory structure we generated looks like this meow.
59a2f906: ### All components of the article page have been covered. Now, it's time to contribute your theme!
fa2f7591: A page may have multiple navigation bars, so theme authors need to adapt accordingly.
